name: STANDARDS-URLS: fetcher uses If-None-Match / If-Modified-Since when entry has etag/last_modified
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/fetch-source.sh" --registry "$PWD/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml" --id src-1 --fetcher-stub "$PWD/probe.sh" 2>out.txt && grep -E 'If-None-Match: "abc123"' out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf 'src-1:
  publisher: A
  url: https://a.com
  license: CC-BY-4.0
  last_verified: 2026-05-04
  etag: "abc123"
' > STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
